_source: villain_classes.bin + villaindef.bin from the game client (2026-06-19 data; see README). Damage tables use the negative-HP convention; magnitudes are the scale values. Arrays are per-level, index = level-1 (49 = level 50). NOTE: henchman SPAWN LEVELS (tier level offsets) come from the summon power effects, not these tables - wire separately.
